title: Implement Wave 35 manager assignment decision timeline contract
description: Extend the manager assignment detail API so queue-aware assignment detail responses expose an additive decision summary and richer timeline metadata while preserving the existing contract shape for current mobile consumers.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/properties/priorities/queue/{queueItemId} returns additive decision_summary metadata for manager role
Timeline events expose deterministic event metadata needed to distinguish reassignment, completion, cancellation, and evidence-backed changes
Requests that ignore the new additive fields continue to work without contract breakage
